calendar.matters:
Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoenas
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ian Eliasoph, Esq. 415-551-3864 Deputy City Attorney, SF City Attorney's Office for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - The matter is not contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoenas.

PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO ENFORCE ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENAS SERVED ON RESPONDENTS REGIONAL PROTECTION AGENCY SERVICES, REGIONAL PROTECTION AGENCY, INC. AND JESSIE GILLESPIE IS GRANTED. Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
